This research presents a solution with a semi-circular, curved-link tensegrity robot that strikes a balance between efficient rolling locomotion and controlled stability, enabled by discontinuities present at the arc endpoints. Building upon an existing geometric static modeling framework [1], this work presents the system design of an improved Tensegrity eXploratory Robot 2 (TeXploR2). Internal shifting masses instantaneously roll along each curved-link, dynamically altering the two points of contact with the ground plane. Simulations of quasistatic, piecewise continuous locomotion sequences reveal new insights into the positional displacement between inertial and body frames. Non-intuitive rolling behaviors are identified and experimentally validated using a tetherless prototype, demonstrating successful dynamic locomotion. A preliminary impact test highlights the tensegrity structure's inherent shock absorption capabilities and conformability. Future work will focus on finalizing a dynamic model that is experimentally validated with extended testing in real-world environments as well as further refinement of the prototype to incorporate additional curved-links and subsequent ground contact points for increased controllability.

</details>


### [450] [LIMBERO: A Limbed Climbing Exploration Robot Toward Traveling on Rocky Cliffs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16531)
*Kentaro Uno,Masazumi Imai,Kazuki Takada,Teruhiro Kataonami,Yudai Matsuura,Antonin Ringeval-Meusnier,Keita Nagaoka,Mikio Eguchi,Ryo Nishibe,Kazuya Yoshida*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出LIMBERO，一种10公斤级四足攀爬机器人，采用脊型夹持器，在崎岖陡峭地形上实现稳定运动与攀爬；其单电机驱动的新型夹持器兼具轻量（525克）与高抓力（>150 N），并结合基于几何的抓取性指数可视化算法，首次在1G重力下成功攀爬陡峭岩面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统轮式机器人难以应对月球和行星表面的粗糙不平地形，而具备足端夹持器的多足攀爬机器人成为有前景的替代方案。

Method: 设计单电机驱动、耦合指闭合与脊钩挂动作的脊型夹持器；开发基于几何连续地形的抓取性指数可视化算法；将二者集成至LIMBERO机器人平台。

Result: 夹持器重量仅525 g但抓力超150 N；LIMBERO在1G重力下成功攀爬陡峭岩石表面，为同尺度攀爬机器人首次实现。

Conclusion: LIMBERO验证了轻量化高抓力夹持器与地形感知算法结合的有效性，为未来地外天体复杂地形自主探索提供了可行技术路径。

Abstract: In lunar and planetary exploration, legged robots have attracted significant attention as an alternative to conventional wheeled robots, which struggle to traverse rough and uneven terrain. To enable locomotion over highly irregular and steeply inclined surfaces, limbed climbing robots equipped with grippers on their feet have emerged as a promising solution. In this paper, we present LIMBERO, a 10 kg-class quadrupedal climbing robot that employs spine-type grippers for stable locomotion and climbing on rugged and steep terrain. We first introduce a novel gripper design featuring coupled finger-closing and spine-hooking motions, tightly actuated by a single motor, which achieves exceptional grasping performance (>150 N) despite its lightweight design (525 g). Furthermore, we develop an efficient algorithm to visualize a geometry-based graspability index on continuous rough terrain. Finally, we integrate these components into LIMBERO and demonstrate its ability to ascend steep rocky surfaces under a 1 G gravity condition, a performance not previously achieved yet for limbed climbing robots of this scale.

</details>


### [451] [Kamino: GPU-based Massively Parallel Simulation of Multi-Body Systems with Challenging Topologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16536)
*Vassilios Tsounis,Guirec Maloisel,Christian Schumacher,Ruben Grandia,Agon Serifi,David Müller,Chris Amevor,Tobias Widmer,Moritz Bächer*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Kamino是一个基于GPU的物理求解器，用于大规模并行模拟高度耦合的异构机械系统，支持闭链运动学结构和高保真接触动力学，可高效支持大规模强化学习训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法常通过近似为运动学树或引入显式闭环约束来规避强耦合运动学结构（如运动学环）带来的计算挑战，限制了对真实机械系统（尤其是利用闭链获得机械优势的系统）的高保真建模与仿真。

Method: 基于NVIDIA Warp在Python中实现，集成于Newton框架；采用先进的约束优化算法，将刚体多体正向动力学建模为非线性互补问题（NCP）以精确求解约束力；原生支持运动学环和异构批量仿真。

Result: 成功在单GPU上并行仿真4096个环境，训练出DR Legs（含6个嵌套运动学环的双足机器人）的可行行走强化学习策略；实现了高保真接触动力学仿真，无需简化或凸化近似。

Conclusion: Kamino通过原生支持强耦合机械结构和异构批量仿真，显著降低了复杂机器人系统的高通量、高保真仿真的门槛，为数据驱动方法（如大规模强化学习）提供了高效可靠的仿真基础。

Abstract: We present Kamino, a GPU-based physics solver for massively parallel simulations of heterogeneous highly-coupled mechanical systems. Implemented in Python using NVIDIA Warp and integrated into the Newton framework, it enables the application of data-driven methods, such as large-scale reinforcement learning, to complex robotic systems that exhibit strongly coupled kinematic and dynamic constraints such as kinematic loops. The latter are often circumvented by practitioners; approximating the system topology as a kinematic tree and incorporating explicit loop-closure constraints or so-called mimic joints. Kamino aims at alleviating this burden by natively supporting these types of coupling. This capability facilitates high-throughput parallelized simulations that capture the true nature of mechanical systems that exploit closed kinematic chains for mechanical advantage. Moreover, Kamino supports heterogeneous worlds, allowing for batched simulation of structurally diverse robots on a single GPU. At its core lies a state-of-the-art constrained optimization algorithm that computes constraint forces by solving the constrained rigid multi-body forward dynamics transcribed as a nonlinear complementarity problem. This leads to high-fidelity simulations that can resolve contact dynamics without resorting to approximate models that simplify and/or convexify the problem. We demonstrate RL policy training on DR Legs, a biped with six nested kinematic loops, generating a feasible walking policy while simulating 4096 parallel environments on a single GPU.

</details>


### [452] [Conservative Offline Robot Policy Learning via Posterior-Transition Reweighting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16542)
*Wanpeng Zhang,Hao Luo,Sipeng Zheng,Yicheng Feng,Haiweng Xu,Ziheng Xi,Chaoyi Xu,Haoqi Yuan,Zongqing Lu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需奖励信号、保守的离线后训练方法PTR，通过为每个训练样本分配基于其动作后果可归因性的权重，提升机器人策略在异构数据上的适应能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线后训练方法对异构机器人数据（如不同本体、相机设置、质量参差的演示）采用均匀加权，易受低质量或冲突样本干扰，导致性能下降。

Method: PTR方法将每个样本的动作后果编码为隐式目标，放入错配目标池中，利用独立的转移评分器估计该目标被识别的softmax后验概率；以后验与均匀分布的比值定义PTR得分，并经裁剪与混合后用于自归一化加权回归。

Result: PTR在多种异构机器人数据集上提升了离线策略适应的鲁棒性与性能，且兼容扩散模型和流匹配动作头，无需策略似然计算。

Conclusion: PTR通过动态重加权实现更保守、更具归因性的监督学习，显著改善了在真实世界异构机器人数据上的离线后训练效果。

Abstract: Offline post-training adapts a pretrained robot policy to a target dataset by supervised regression on recorded actions. In practice, robot datasets are heterogeneous: they mix embodiments, camera setups, and demonstrations of varying quality, so many trajectories reflect recovery behavior, inconsistent operator skill, or weakly informative supervision. Uniform post-training gives equal credit to all samples and can therefore average over conflicting or low-attribution data. We propose Posterior-Transition Reweighting (PTR), a reward-free and conservative post-training method that decides how much each training sample should influence the supervised update. For each sample, PTR encodes the observed post-action consequence as a latent target, inserts it into a candidate pool of mismatched targets, and uses a separate transition scorer to estimate a softmax identification posterior over target indices. The posterior-to-uniform ratio defines the PTR score, which is converted into a clipped-and-mixed weight and applied to the original action objective through self-normalized weighted regression. This construction requires no tractable policy likelihood and is compatible with both diffusion and flow-matching action heads. Rather than uniformly trusting all recorded supervision, PTR reallocates credit according to how attributable each sample's post-action consequence is under the current representation, improving conservative offline adaptation to heterogeneous robot data.

</details>


### [453] [A Pin-Array Structured Climbing Robot for Stable Locomotion on Steep Rocky Terrain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16543)
*Keita Nagaoka,Kentaro Uno,Kazuya Yoshida*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型移动攀爬机器人，采用被动顺应的针阵列结构夹持器，无需复杂传感与控制即可在不规则表面上稳定附着；通过垂直分裂式弹性针设计实现微尺度机械互锁，并经统计建模与实验验证了抓握不确定性主要源于单针受力与接触数的变异性；机器人在室内外多种倾斜及天然岩面场景中均表现出稳健运动能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 攀爬机器人在非结构化环境中面临附着不可靠的挑战，尤其在不规则表面上难以实现稳定抓握。

Method: 设计并实现了一种配备柔性针阵列结构夹持器的移动攀爬机器人；每根针采用垂直分裂结构，融合弹性元件与金属脊柱以实现机械互锁；结合统计建模与实验验证分析抓握不确定性来源。

Result: 机器人在室内10–30度倾斜墙面及室外天然岩石地形上均实现了稳健、稳定的运动；验证了被动顺应性与机械冗余可显著提升实际环境中的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 强调被动顺应与机械冗余的设计范式，可在降低控制复杂度的同时，为真实世界攀爬机器人提供实用且鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Climbing robots face significant challenges when navigating unstructured environments, where reliable attachment to irregular surfaces is critical. We present a novel mobile climbing robot equipped with compliant pin-array structured grippers that passively conform to surface irregularities, ensuring stable ground gripping without the need for complicated sensing or control. Each pin features a vertically split design, combining an elastic element with a metal spine to enable mechanical interlocking with microscale surface features. Statistical modeling and experimental validation indicate that variability in individual pin forces and contact numbers are the primary sources of grasping uncertainty. The robot demonstrated robust and stable locomotion in indoor tests on inclined walls (10-30 degrees) and in outdoor tests on natural rocky terrain. This work highlights that a design emphasizing passive compliance and mechanical redundancy provides a practical and robust solution for real-world climbing robots while minimizing control complexity.

</details>


### [454] [ASCENT: Transformer-Based Aircraft Trajectory Prediction in Non-Towered Terminal Airspace](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16550)
*Alexander Prutsch,David Schinagl,Horst Possegger*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了ASCENT模型，一种轻量级的基于Transformer的多模态3D飞机轨迹预测方法，适用于无塔台终端空域，通过引入领域感知的3D坐标归一化和参数化预测，在TrajAir和TartanAviation数据集上实现了优于现有基线的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提高通用航空在无塔台终端空域中的安全性，该区域交通密度高、事故风险大，亟需准确的轨迹预测技术。

Method: 提出ASCENT模型，采用基于Transformer的运动编码器和基于查询的解码器，结合领域感知的3D坐标归一化与参数化预测，支持低延迟、多假设的机动轨迹生成。

Result: 在TrajAir和TartanAviation数据集上显著优于先前基线；消融实验验证了解码器设计、坐标系建模和参数化输出的有效性。

Conclusion: ASCENT是一种高效、实时的无塔台终端空域飞机轨迹预测方法，具备实际部署潜力。

Abstract: Accurate trajectory prediction can improve General Aviation safety in non-towered terminal airspace, where high traffic density increases accident risk. We present ASCENT, a lightweight transformer-based model for multi-modal 3D aircraft trajectory forecasting, which integrates domain-aware 3D coordinate normalization and parameterized predictions. ASCENT employs a transformer-based motion encoder and a query-based decoder, enabling the generation of diverse maneuver hypotheses with low latency. Experiments on the TrajAir and TartanAviation datasets demonstrate that our model outperforms prior baselines, as the encoder effectively captures motion dynamics and the decoder aligns with structured aircraft traffic patterns. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm the contributions of the decoder design, coordinate-frame modeling, and parameterized outputs. These results establish ASCENT as an effective approach for real-time aircraft trajectory prediction in non-towered terminal airspace.

</details>


### [455] [Scalable Inspection Planning via Flow-based Mixed Integer Linear Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16593)
*Adir Morgan,Kiril Solovey,Oren Salzman*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于网络流重构的高效混合整数线性规划（MILP）方法，用于求解大规模图检验规划（GIP）问题，在运行时间和解质量上显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图检验规划（GIP）问题因需同时满足兴趣点覆盖与路径连通性约束而难以在大规模场景下高效求解，现有方法在可扩展性和最优性保证方面存在明显不足。

Method: 将GIP的核心约束重构为网络流形式，构建高效的MILP模型，并设计专用的Branch-and-Cut求解器以利用流结构的组合特性。

Result: 在医学与基础设施基准及大规模合成实例上，该方法将大规模实例的最优性间隙降低30–50%，并首次实现对高达15,000个顶点和数千POI问题的可行求解，远超现有方法的规模极限。

Conclusion: 所提MILP框架通过网络流建模与定制化求解策略，显著提升了GIP问题的可扩展性与求解质量，为实际机器人检验任务提供了更可靠、更高效的优化基础。

Abstract: Inspection planning is concerned with computing the shortest robot path to inspect a given set of points of interest (POIs) using the robot's sensors. This problem arises in a wide range of applications from manufacturing to medical robotics. To alleviate the problem's complexity, recent methods rely on sampling-based methods to obtain a more manageable (discrete) graph inspection planning (GIP) problem. Unfortunately, GIP still remains highly difficult to solve at scale as it requires simultaneously satisfying POI-coverage and path-connectivity constraints, giving rise to a challenging optimization problem, particularly at scales encountered in real-world scenarios. In this work, we present highly scalable Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solutions for GIP that significantly advance the state-of-the-art in both runtime and solution quality. Our key insight is a reformulation of the problem's core constraints as a network flow, which enables effective MILP models and a specialized Branch-and-Cut solver that exploits the combinatorial structure of flows. We evaluate our approach on medical and infrastructure benchmarks alongside large-scale synthetic instances. Across all scenarios, our method produces substantially tighter lower bounds than existing formulations, reducing optimality gaps by 30-50% on large instances. Furthermore, our solver demonstrates unprecedented scalability: it provides non-trivial solutions for problems with up to 15,000 vertices and thousands of POIs, where prior state-of-the-art methods typically exhaust memory or fail to provide any meaningful optimality guarantees.

</details>


### [456] [Dexterous grasp data augmentation based on grasp synthesis with fingertip workspace cloud and contact-aware sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16609)
*Liqi Wu,Haoyu Jia,Kento Kawaharazuka,Hirokazu Ishida,Kei Okada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于遥操作和指尖接触感知采样的抓取生成框架（FSG）与自动工作空间云生成方法（AutoWS），用于高效生成适用于任意手部结构的高质量抓取数据，显著提升抓取姿态生成速度与有效性，并支持实时、类人化抓取。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动的机器人抓取方法受限于抓取数据集生成效率低，且难以泛化到结构多样的机械手。

Method: 提出基于遥操作采集少量抓取姿态示例，结合指尖接触感知的采样式抓取生成器（FSG）进行数据增强；并设计AutoWS方法，自动生成嵌入手部结构信息的结构化指尖工作空间点云，避免逆运动学计算。

Result: 在YCB物体上的实验表明，该方法在生成速度和有效抓取姿态率上显著优于现有方法，支持任意结构手部的实时抓取生成，并能产生类人抓取姿态。

Conclusion: 所提框架为数据驱动抓取训练提供了一种高效、鲁棒的数据增强工具，兼具通用性、实时性与生物合理性。

Abstract: Robotic grasping is a fundamental yet crucial component of robotic applications, as effective grasping often serves as the starting point for various tasks. With the rapid advancement of neural networks, data-driven approaches for robotic grasping have become mainstream. However, efficiently generating grasp datasets for training remains a bottleneck. This is compounded by the diverse structures of robotic hands, making the design of generalizable grasp generation methods even more complex. In this work, we propose a teleoperation-based framework to collect a small set of grasp pose demonstrations, which are augmented using FSG--a Fingertip-contact-aware Sampling-based Grasp generator. Based on the demonstrated grasp poses, we propose AutoWS, which automatically generates structured workspace clouds of robotic fingertips, embedding the hand structure information directly into the clouds to eliminate the need for inverse kinematics calculations. Experiments on grasping the YCB objects show that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches in both speed and valid pose generation rate. Our framework enables real-time grasp generation for hands with arbitrary structures and produces human-like grasps when combined with demonstrations, providing an efficient and robust data augmentation tool for data-driven grasp training.

</details>


### [457] [Reconciling distributed compliance with high-performance control in continuum soft robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16630)
*Vito Daniele Perfetta,Daniel Feliu Talegon,Ebrahim Shahabi,Cosimo Della Santina*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高度柔顺、全连续体结构的软体机械臂，通过协同设计建模、驱动与控制，实现了在动态条件下的快速、精确任务空间收敛，打破了软度与控制精度不可兼得的传统认知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软体连续体机器人因过度依赖刚性分段结构而牺牲了真正的柔顺性，导致学界普遍认为分布式柔顺性与动态精度互斥；本文旨在挑战并推翻这一隐含结论。

Method: 采用无硬件离散化、无刚度模式抑制的全柔顺连续体结构；集成直驱执行器与可耦合弯曲/扭转的腱绳布线方案；构建基于欠驱动系统降阶应变建模的结构化非线性控制架构。

Result: 实验验证了该系统可在毫毫米级精度下实现动态笛卡尔任务（如快速定位与交互），任务执行速度达当前软体机器人最快水平，较先前方法提升近四倍。

Conclusion: 分布式柔顺性与高性能动态控制可以共存，为开发兼具形态丰富性与刚性机器人操作能力的真正软体操纵器开辟了新路径。

Abstract: High-performance closed-loop control of truly soft continuum manipulators has remained elusive. Experimental demonstrations have largely relied on sufficiently stiff, piecewise architectures in which each actuated segment behaves as a distributed yet effectively rigid element, while deformation modes beyond simple bending are suppressed. This strategy simplifies modeling and control, but sidesteps the intrinsic complexity of a fully compliant body and makes the system behave as a serial kinematic chain, much like a conventional articulated robot. An implicit conclusion has consequently emerged within the community: distributed softness and dynamic precision are incompatible. Here we show this trade-off is not fundamental. We present a highly compliant, fully continuum robotic arm - without hardware discretization or stiffness-based mode suppression - that achieves fast, precise task-space convergence under dynamic conditions. The platform integrates direct-drive actuation, a tendon routing scheme enabling coupled bending and twisting, and a structured nonlinear control architecture grounded in reduced-order strain modeling of underactuated systems. Modeling, actuation, and control are co-designed to preserve essential mechanical complexity while enabling high-bandwidth loop closure. Experiments demonstrate accurate, repeatable execution of dynamic Cartesian tasks, including fast positioning and interaction. The proposed system achieves the fastest reported task-execution speed among soft robots. At millimetric precision, execution speed increases nearly fourfold compared with prior approaches, while operating on a fully compliant continuum body. These results show that distributed compliance and high-performance dynamic control can coexist, opening a path toward truly soft manipulators approaching the operational capabilities of rigid robots without sacrificing morphological richness.

</details>


### [458] [Kinema4D: Kinematic 4D World Modeling for Spatiotemporal Embodied Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16669)
*Mutian Xu,Tianbao Zhang,Tianqi Liu,Zhaoxi Chen,Xiaoguang Han,Ziwei Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了Kinema4D，一种动作条件下的4D生成式机器人仿真器，通过解耦机器人控制与环境反应，实现高保真、物理合理且具身无关的机器人-世界交互建模，并构建了大规模4D数据集Robo4D-200k支持训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于视频生成的机器人仿真方法多局限于2D空间或依赖静态环境线索，忽视了机器人-世界交互本质是需精确建模的4D时空事件。

Method: Kinema4D将交互解耦为两部分：i) 基于URDF与运动学驱动的精确4D机器人控制轨迹；ii) 将该轨迹投影为时空点图信号，引导生成模型合成同步RGB/点图序列以建模环境动态反应。同时构建了含201,426个交互片段的Robo4D-200k数据集。

Result: 实验表明该方法能生成物理合理、几何一致、具身无关的交互序列，并首次展现出零样本迁移潜力。

Conclusion: Kinema4D恢复了机器人仿真中的4D本质，在保持精确控制的同时实现了高保真环境动态建模，为下一代具身仿真提供了新基础。

Abstract: Simulating robot-world interactions is a cornerstone of Embodied AI. Recently, a few works have shown promise in leveraging video generations to transcend the rigid visual/physical constraints of traditional simulators. However, they primarily operate in 2D space or are guided by static environmental cues, ignoring the fundamental reality that robot-world interactions are inherently 4D spatiotemporal events that require precise interactive modeling. To restore this 4D essence while ensuring the precise robot control, we introduce Kinema4D, a new action-conditioned 4D generative robotic simulator that disentangles the robot-world interaction into: i) Precise 4D representation of robot controls: we drive a URDF-based 3D robot via kinematics, producing a precise 4D robot control trajectory. ii) Generative 4D modeling of environmental reactions: we project the 4D robot trajectory into a pointmap as a spatiotemporal visual signal, controlling the generative model to synthesize complex environments' reactive dynamics into synchronized RGB/pointmap sequences. To facilitate training, we curated a large-scale dataset called Robo4D-200k, comprising 201,426 robot interaction episodes with high-quality 4D annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method effectively simulates physically-plausible, geometry-consistent, and embodiment-agnostic interactions that faithfully mirror diverse real-world dynamics. For the first time, it shows potential zero-shot transfer capability, providing a high-fidelity foundation for advancing next-generation embodied simulation.

</details>


### [459] [When Should a Robot Think? Resource-Aware Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning for Embodied Robotic Decision-Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16673)
*Jun Liu,Pu Zhao,Zhenglun Kong,Xuan Shen,Peiyan Dong,Fan Yang,Lin Cui,Hao Tang,Geng Yuan,Wei Niu,Wenbin Zhang,Xue Lin,Gaowen Liu,Yanzhi Wang,Dong Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出RARRL框架，利用强化学习实现资源感知的推理调度，使具身智能体能自适应决定何时推理、用何种推理角色及分配多少计算资源，从而在提升任务成功率的同时降低延迟并增强鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM推理带来高延迟和资源开销，影响具身机器人实时性与可靠性；固定或启发式推理策略难以平衡推理充分性与效率。

Method: 提出RARRL——一种基于强化学习的分层资源感知推理调度框架，学习高层编排策略，根据观测、执行历史和剩余资源动态决策是否推理、选用何种推理角色及分配多少计算预算。

Result: 在ALFRED基准实测延迟配置下，RARRL显著提升任务成功率，同时降低执行延迟并增强系统鲁棒性，优于固定或启发式推理策略。

Conclusion: 自适应推理控制对构建高效、可靠的具身机器人系统至关重要；RARRL为解决推理-行动权衡问题提供了可行且有效的范式。

Abstract: Embodied robotic systems increasingly rely on large language model (LLM)-based agents to support high-level reasoning, planning, and decision-making during interactions with the environment. However, invoking LLM reasoning introduces substantial computational latency and resource overhead, which can interrupt action execution and reduce system reliability. Excessive reasoning may delay actions, while insufficient reasoning often leads to incorrect decisions and task failures. This raises a fundamental question for embodied agents: when should the agent reason, and when should it act? In this work, we propose RARRL (Resource-Aware Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning), a hierarchical framework for resource-aware orchestration of embodied agents. Rather than learning low-level control policies, RARRL learns a high-level orchestration policy that operates at the agent's decision-making layer. This policy enables the agent to adaptively determine whether to invoke reasoning, which reasoning role to employ, and how much computational budget to allocate based on current observations, execution history, and remaining resources. Extensive experiments, including evaluations with empirical latency profiles derived from the ALFRED benchmark, show that RARRL consistently improves task success rates while reducing execution latency and enhancing robustness compared with fixed or heuristic reasoning strategies. These results demonstrate that adaptive reasoning control is essential for building reliable and efficient embodied robotic agents.

</details>


### [460] [Learning Whole-Body Control for a Salamander Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16683)
*Mengze Tian,Qiyuan Fu,Chuanfang Ning,Javier Jia Jie Pey,Auke Ijspeert*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的统一关节级控制框架，用于多模态（陆地行走与水中游泳）两栖蝾螈机器人，通过仿真到现实迁移实现了真实世界中的稳定行走，并在仿真中实现了步态转换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有蝾螈机器人多依赖CPG或模型驱动控制，缺乏可迁移的学习型全身体节关节控制；且少有腿式机器人在两栖环境中使用学习型控制器。

Method: 采用强化学习将本体感知观测和目标速度映射为关节动作；结合系统级实-仿匹配与仿真到现实迁移策略部署于硬件。

Result: 在真实世界中实现平坦及不平地面的稳定协调行走；在仿真中成功实现行走与游泳的模态转换。

Conclusion: 该学习框架为高度冗余两栖机器人的泛化控制提供了可行路径，也为跨物理介质运动机制研究提供了新工具。

Abstract: Amphibious legged robots inspired by salamanders are promising in applications in complex amphibious environments. However, despite the significant success of training controllers that achieve diverse locomotion behaviors in conventional quadrupedal robots, most salamander robots relied on central-pattern-generator (CPG)-based and model-based coordination strategies for locomotion control. Learning unified joint-level whole-body control that reliably transfers from simulation to highly articulated physical salamander robots remains relatively underexplored. In addition, few legged robots have tried learning-based controllers in amphibious environments. In this work, we employ Reinforcement Learning to map proprioceptive observations and commanded velocities to joint-level actions, allowing coordinated locomotor behaviors to emerge. To deploy these policies on hardware, we adopt a system-level real-to-sim matching and sim-to-real transfer strategy. The learned controller achieves stable and coordinated walking on both flat and uneven terrains in the real world. Beyond terrestrial locomotion, the framework enables transitions between walking and swimming in simulation, highlighting a phenomenon of interest for understanding locomotion across distinct physical modes.

</details>


### [461] [vAccSOL: Efficient and Transparent AI Vision Offloading for Mobile Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16685)
*Adam Zahir,Michele Gucciardom Falk Selker,Anastasios Nanos,Kostis Papazafeiropoulos,Carlos J. Bernardos,Nicolas Weber,Roberto Gonzalez*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: vAccSOL是一个面向移动机器人和边缘平台的AI视觉计算框架，通过神经网络编译器SOL与轻量执行框架vAccel协同，实现硬件优化推理与灵活任务卸载，在不修改应用的前提下显著降低功耗并提升帧率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动机器人受限于算力与能耗，难以高效运行现代视觉AI负载；现有嵌入式加速器依赖专有软件栈，用户自定义模型难以充分利用异构硬件资源。

Method: 提出vAccSOL框架，包含两部分：1）SOL——轻量、低依赖的神经网络编译器，生成硬件优化的推理库；2）vAccel——透明调度执行框架，支持本地推理或自动卸载至邻近边缘设备。

Result: 在四足机器人实测中，SOL性能媲美或优于PyTorch编译器基线；结合边缘卸载，机器人端功耗最高降低80%，边缘端功耗降低60%，视觉流水线帧率提升最高达24倍。

Conclusion: vAccSOL实现了高效、透明、跨平台的AI视觉计算，显著延长电池供电机器人的续航时间，为资源受限机器人系统提供了实用可行的部署方案。

Abstract: Mobile robots are increasingly deployed for inspection, patrol, and search-and-rescue operations, relying on computer vision for perception, navigation, and autonomous decision-making. However, executing modern vision workloads onboard is challenging due to limited compute resources and strict energy constraints. While some platforms include embedded accelerators, these are typically tied to proprietary software stacks, leaving user-defined workloads to run on resource-constrained companion computers.
  We present vAccSOL, a framework for efficient and transparent execution of AI-based vision workloads across heterogeneous robotic and edge platforms. vAccSOL integrates two components: SOL, a neural network compiler that generates optimized inference libraries with minimal runtime dependencies, and vAccel, a lightweight execution framework that transparently dispatches inference locally on the robot or to nearby edge infrastructure. This combination enables hardware-optimized inference and flexible execution placement without requiring modifications to robot applications.
  We evaluate vAccSOL on a real-world testbed with a commercial quadruped robot and twelve deep learning models covering image classification, video classification, and semantic segmentation. Compared to a PyTorch compiler baseline, SOL achieves comparable or better inference performance. With edge offloading, vAccSOL reduces robot-side power consumption by up to 80% and edge-side power by up to 60% compared to PyTorch, while increasing vision pipeline frame rate by up to 24x, extending the operating lifetime of battery-powered robots.

</details>


### [462] [Beyond Cybathlon: On-demand Quadrupedal Assistance for People with Limited Mobility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16772)
*Carmen Scheidemann,Andrei Cramariuc,Changan Chen,Jia-Ruei Chiu,Marco Hutter*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于共享自主的随需 quadrupedal 辅助机器人系统，通过语义导航与口控操纵杆接口，支持轮椅用户在不牺牲自身机动性的前提下完成移动操作任务，并在Cybathlon 2024及居家实验中验证了其有效性与用户接受度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轮椅集成机械臂方案增大体积、降低机动性，无法兼顾辅助能力与用户自主移动需求；亟需一种灵活、低侵入、高自主的辅助机器人系统。

Method: 设计四足辅助机器人系统，采用共享自主控制（半自主任务执行+人类遥操作）；实现语义感知、避障导航；开发嘴控水平摇杆接口用于精细末端操作；自动化抓取-放置任务与环境移动。

Result: 在Cybathlon 2024和居家实验中验证系统性能：可完成多样化（含灵巧操作）任务；用户研究显示更高自主性显著降低操作者认知负荷；主观评价结果媲美先前SOTA。

Conclusion: 该系统为轮椅使用者提供了一种灵活、敏捷、高自主的移动操作辅助方案，有望提升其日常生活独立性，且无需外部协助。

Abstract: Background: Assistance robots have the potential to increase the independence of people who need daily care due to limited mobility or being wheelchair-bound. Current solutions of attaching robotic arms to motorized wheelchairs offer limited additional mobility at the cost of increased size and reduced wheelchair maneuverability.
  Methods: We present an on-demand quadrupedal assistance robot system controlled via a shared autonomy approach, which combines semi-autonomous task execution with human teleoperation. Due to the mobile nature of the system it can assist the operator whenever needed and perform autonomous tasks independently, without otherwise restricting their mobility. We automate pick-and-place tasks, as well as robot movement through the environment with semantic, collision-aware navigation. For teleoperation, we present a mouth-level joystick interface that enables an operator with reduced mobility to control the robot's end effector for precision manipulation.
  Results: We showcase our system in the \textit{Cybathlon 2024 Assistance Robot Race}, and validate it in an at-home experimental setup, where we measure task completion times and user satisfaction. We find our system capable of assisting in a broad variety of tasks, including those that require dexterous manipulation. The user study confirms the intuition that increased robot autonomy alleviates the operator's mental load.
  Conclusions: We present a flexible system that has the potential to help people in wheelchairs maintain independence in everyday life by enabling them to solve mobile manipulation problems without external support. We achieve results comparable to previous state-of-the-art on subjective metrics while allowing for more autonomy of the operator and greater agility for manipulation.

</details>


### [463] [Development of Low-Cost and Bidirectional Syringe Pumps for Soft Robotics Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16803)
*Krishamsu Subedi Chhetri,Aryan Mayor,Elise Corbin,Logan Walker,John Rieffel*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种低成本、模块化的注射泵系统，用于驱动基于硅胶体素的软体机器人（Silibots），该系统可同时实现正压充气和负压抽真空，具有硬件模块化与软件可定制的特点，提升了驱动精度与灵活性，有利于软体机器人在科研与教育中的普及。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统气动驱动方式（如高压电磁阀、医用隔膜泵等）在驱动硅胶体素软体机器人时存在效率低、成本高、结构复杂或控制精度差等问题，亟需一种更优的驱动方案。

Method: 设计并构建了一套由市售元器件和3D打印部件组成的低成本、模块化注射泵系统，支持双向气流控制（充气与抽真空），配备可定制软件以实现参数独立设置及多泵协同控制。

Result: 该注射泵系统成功实现了对Silibots的高精度、灵活气动驱动，验证了其在多种形变行为中的有效性，并展现出良好的可扩展性与易用性。

Conclusion: 所提出的注射泵系统为软体机器人提供了一种经济、可靠且开放的驱动解决方案，显著降低了实验门槛，有望推动软体机器人技术在研究与教学场景中的广泛应用。

Abstract: Soft robotics leverages deformable materials to develop robots capable of navigating unstructured and dynamic environments. Silicone Voxel-Based Soft Robots (Silibots) are a type of pneumatically actuated soft robots that rely on the inflation and deflation of their voxels for shape-shifting behaviors. However, traditional pneumatic actuation methods (high pressure solenoids, medical diaphragm pumps, micro compressors, compressed fluid) pose significant challenges due to their limited efficacy, cost, complexity, or lack of precision. This work introduces a low cost and modular syringe pump system, constructed with off the shelf and 3D printed parts, designed to overcome these limitations. The syringe pump system also enhances actuation with the unique ability to pull a vacuum as well pump air into the soft robot. Furthermore, the syringe pump features modular hardware and customizable software, allowing for researchers to tailor the syringe pump to their requirements or operate multiple pumps simultaneously with unique pump parameters. This flexibility makes the syringe pump an accessible and scalable tool that paves the way for broader adoption of soft robotic technologies in research and education.

</details>


### [464] [DexGrasp-Zero: A Morphology-Aligned Policy for Zero-Shot Cross-Embodiment Dexterous Grasping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16806)
*Yuliang Wu,Yanhan Lin,WengKit Lao,Yuhao Lin,Yi-Lin Wei,Wei-Shi Zheng,Ancong Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出DexGrasp-Zero，一种基于形态对齐图表示与物理属性注入机制的零样本跨硬件灵巧手抓取策略，在仿真和真实实验中均显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为应对日益多样的灵巧手硬件，需开发无需重复训练即可实现零样本跨硬件抓取的通用策略；而现有方法因依赖中间运动目标重定向，易引入误差并违反硬件特有物理约束。

Method: 提出形态对齐图表示（将各手关键点映射为解剖学一致节点，并赋予三轴正交运动基元）；设计形态对齐图卷积网络（MAGCN），并嵌入物理属性注入机制以融合手部特有物理约束。

Result: 在YCB数据集仿真中，联合训练于四种异构手（Allegro、Shadow、Schunk、Ability）后，对未见手（LEAP、Inspire）零样本抓取成功率达85%，较SOTA提升59.5%；真实世界三平台（LEAP、Inspire、Revo2）测试对未见物体平均成功率达82%。

Conclusion: DexGrasp-Zero通过结构化语义对齐与物理约束显式建模，实现了高泛化性、高鲁棒性的零样本跨硬件抓取，为通用灵巧操作策略提供了新范式。

Abstract: To meet the demands of increasingly diverse dexterous hand hardware, it is crucial to develop a policy that enables zero-shot cross-embodiment grasping without redundant re-learning. Cross-embodiment alignment is challenging due to heterogeneous hand kinematics and physical constraints. Existing approaches typically predict intermediate motion targets and retarget them to each embodiment, which may introduce errors and violate embodiment-specific limits, hindering transfer across diverse hands. To overcome these limitations, we propose \textit{DexGrasp-Zero}, a policy that learns universal grasping skills from diverse embodiments, enabling zero-shot transfer to unseen hands. We first introduce a morphology-aligned graph representation that maps each hand's kinematic keypoints to anatomically grounded nodes and equips each node with tri-axial orthogonal motion primitives, enabling structural and semantic alignment across different morphologies. Relying on this graph-based representation, we design a \textit{Morphology-Aligned Graph Convolutional Network} (MAGCN) to encode the graph for policy learning. MAGCN incorporates a \textit{Physical Property Injection} mechanism that fuses hand-specific physical constraints into the graph features, enabling adaptive compensation for varying link lengths and actuation limits for precise and stable grasping. Our extensive simulation evaluations on the YCB dataset demonstrate that our policy, jointly trained on four heterogeneous hands (Allegro, Shadow, Schunk, Ability), achieves an 85\% zero-shot success rate on unseen hardware (LEAP, Inspire), outperforming the state-of-the-art method by 59.5\%. Real-world experiments further evaluate our policy on three robot platforms (LEAP, Inspire, Revo2), achieving an 82\% average success rate on unseen objects.

</details>


### [465] [CABTO: Context-Aware Behavior Tree Grounding for Robot Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16809)
*Yishuai Cai,Xinglin Chen,Yunxin Mao,Kun Hu,Minglong Li,Yaodong Yang,Yuanpei Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了CABTO框架，用于自动构建完整且一致的行为树（BT）系统，解决了BT Grounding问题，利用预训练大模型进行启发式搜索，并通过实验验证了其在多个机器人操作场景中的有效性与效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: BT规划通常假设行为树系统已预先构建好（包括高层动作模型和底层控制策略），而这往往需要大量专家知识和人工工作，因此需要自动化地构建完整一致的BT系统。

Method: 本文形式化定义了BT Grounding问题，并提出CABTO框架，利用预训练大模型对动作模型和控制策略空间进行启发式搜索，结合BT规划器和环境观测的上下文反馈进行引导。

Result: 在三个不同机器人操作场景、共七个任务集上的实验表明，CABTO能高效生成完整且一致的行为树系统。

Conclusion: CABTO是首个能高效解决BT Grounding问题的框架，显著降低了对专家知识和人工干预的依赖，推动了行为树自动化构建的发展。

Abstract: Behavior Trees (BTs) offer a powerful paradigm for designing modular and reactive robot controllers. BT planning, an emerging field, provides theoretical guarantees for the automated generation of reliable BTs. However, BT planning typically assumes that a well-designed BT system is already grounded -- comprising high-level action models and low-level control policies -- which often requires extensive expert knowledge and manual effort. In this paper, we formalize the BT Grounding problem: the automated construction of a complete and consistent BT system. We analyze its complexity and introduce CABTO (Context-Aware Behavior Tree grOunding), the first framework to efficiently solve this challenge. CABTO leverages pre-trained Large Models (LMs) to heuristically search the space of action models and control policies, guided by contextual feedback from BT planners and environmental observations. Experiments spanning seven task sets across three distinct robotic manipulation scenarios demonstrate CABTO's effectiveness and efficiency in generating complete and consistent behavior tree systems.

</details>


### [466] [Real-Time Decoding of Movement Onset and Offset for Brain-Controlled Rehabilitation Exoskeleton](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16825)
*Kanishka Mitra,Satyam Kumar,Frigyes Samuel Racz,Deland Liu,Ashish D. Deshpande,José del R. Millán*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于在线双态运动想象的EEG控制方法，实现对上肢外骨骼康复机器人的直接、意图驱动的启动与停止控制，提升了神经可塑性导向康复的实时性与准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人辅助康复系统多作用于肢体层面，间接影响受损神经环路，难以实现真正基于意图、靶向神经可塑性的康复；亟需一种能直接读取患者运动意图（如启动/终止动作）的非侵入式控制方法。

Method: 采用在线双态运动想象范式，结合新型类无关固视点重定标（fixation-based recentering）方法替代传统任务相关不对称边缘重定标，以消除系统性分类偏差；在八名受试者中开展两轮在线实验，评估EEG对上肢外骨骼启动（onset）与停止（offset）命令的识别性能。

Result: 群体平均命中率：启动命令61.5%，停止命令64.5%；新重定标方法显著提升无阈值可分性（AUC）：启动+56%（p=0.0117），停止+34%（p=0.0251），并降低日间与日内偏差。

Conclusion: 该方法成功弥合了离线解码与实际临床意图控制之间的鸿沟，实现了时间精准、条件可控的康复辅助，为面向神经可塑性的闭环康复系统提供了可行路径，并支持后续临床转化。

Abstract: Robot-assisted therapy can deliver high-dose, task-specific training after neurologic injury, but most systems act primarily at the limb level-engaging the impaired neural circuits only indirectly-which remains a key barrier to truly contingent, neuroplasticity-targeted rehabilitation. We address this gap by implementing online, dual-state motor imagery control of an upper-limb exoskeleton, enabling goal-directed reaches to be both initiated and terminated directly from non-invasive EEG. Eight participants used EEG to initiate assistance and then volitionally halt the robot mid-trajectory. Across two online sessions, group-mean hit rates were 61.5% for onset and 64.5% for offset, demonstrating reliable start-stop command delivery despite instrumental noise and passive arm motion. Methodologically, we reveal a systematic, class-driven bias induced by common task-based recentering using an asymmetric margin diagnostic, and we introduce a class-agnostic fixation-based recentering method that tracks drift without sampling command classes while preserving class geometry. This substantially improves threshold-free separability (AUC gains: onset +56%, p = 0.0117; offset +34%, p = 0.0251) and reduces bias within and across days. Together, these results help bridge offline decoding and practical, intention-driven start-stop control of a rehabilitation exoskeleton, enabling precisely timed, contingent assistance aligned with neuroplasticity goals while supporting future clinical translation.

</details>


### [467] [DreamPlan: Efficient Reinforcement Fine-Tuning of Vision-Language Planners via Video World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16860)
*Emily Yue-Ting Jia,Weiduo Yuan,Tianheng Shi,Vitor Guizilini,Jiageng Mao,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DreamPlan 提出了一种通过视频世界模型对视觉语言模型（VLM）规划器进行强化微调的新框架，避免昂贵的真实世界交互，在不依赖大规模真实数据的前提下显著提升可变形物体操控成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM规划器缺乏具身物理理解，导致在复杂现实环境（尤其是可变形物体操作）中错误累积、成功率低；而直接用真实世界RL微调VLM成本高、不安全且样本效率低。

Method: DreamPlan分两步：1）利用零样本VLM采集探索性交互数据，训练一个动作条件下的视频生成模型（隐式建模物理）；2）在该视频世界模型的‘想象’中，用Odds Ratio Policy Optimization（ORPO）对VLM规划器进行纯仿真强化微调。

Result: DreamPlan显著提升了机器人操控（尤其可变形物体）的成功率，有效弥合了语义推理与物理具身之间的鸿沟，且无需大规模真实世界数据收集。

Conclusion: 通过将VLM规划器与视频世界模型结合并借助ORPO在虚拟环境中微调，DreamPlan为低成本、安全、高效地赋予大模型物理常识提供了新范式。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation requires sophisticated commonsense reasoning, a capability naturally possessed by large-scale Vision-Language Models (VLMs). While VLMs show promise as zero-shot planners, their lack of grounded physical understanding often leads to compounding errors and low success rates when deployed in complex real-world environments, particularly for challenging tasks like deformable object manipulation. Although Reinforcement Learning (RL) can adapt these planners to specific task dynamics, directly fine-tuning VLMs via real-world interaction is prohibitively expensive, unsafe, and sample-inefficient. To overcome this bottleneck, we introduce DreamPlan, a novel framework for the reinforcement fine-tuning of VLM planners via video world models. Instead of relying on costly physical rollouts, DreamPlan first leverages the zero-shot VLM to collect exploratory interaction data. We demonstrate that this sub-optimal data is sufficient to train an action-conditioned video generation model, which implicitly captures complex real-world physics. Subsequently, the VLM planner is fine-tuned entirely within the "imagination" of this video world model using Odds Ratio Policy Optimization (ORPO). By utilizing these virtual rollouts, physical and task-specific knowledge is efficiently injected into the VLM. Our results indicate that DreamPlan bridges the gap between semantic reasoning and physical grounding, significantly improving manipulation success rates without the need for large-scale real-world data collection. Our project page is https://psi-lab.ai/DreamPlan/.

</details>


### [468] [MolmoB0T: Large-Scale Simulation Enables Zero-Shot Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16861)
*Abhay Deshpande,Maya Guru,Rose Hendrix,Snehal Jauhri,Ainaz Eftekhar,Rohun Tripathi,Max Argus,Jordi Salvador,Haoquan Fang,Matthew Wallingford,Wilbert Pumacay,Yejin Kim,Quinn Pfeifer,Ying-Chun Lee,Piper Wolters,Omar Rayyan,Mingtong Zhang,Jiafei Duan,Karen Farley,Winson Han,Eli Vanderbilt,Dieter Fox,Ali Farhadi,Georgia Chalvatzaki,Dhruv Shah,Ranjay Krishna*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文挑战了机器人学习中仿真到现实迁移必须依赖真实世界数据的主流观点，提出通过大规模、多样化的合成仿真数据可实现零样本真实世界迁移，并发布了开源仿真数据生成工具MolmoBot-Engine及180万轨迹数据集MolmoBot-Data，验证了三种策略在静态与移动操作任务上的强泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战当前机器人学习中认为仿真训练必须辅以真实数据或微调才能实现有效sim-to-real迁移的普遍假设，探索仅靠高质量大规模合成仿真数据是否足以支撑零样本真实世界部署。

Method: 构建开源仿真数据生成引擎MolmoBot-Engine，在MolmoSpaces中程序化生成跨机器人、任务与环境的多样化仿真场景；发布含1.8百万专家轨迹的MolmoBot-Data数据集；训练三类策略：基于Molmo2的多帧视觉语言模型MolmoBot、复现π₀架构的MolmoBot-Pi0、轻量级边缘友好型MolmoBot-SPOC；在Franka FR3和RB-Y1两个真实机器人平台上进行零样本评估。

Result: 在无任何真实世界微调前提下，MolmoBot在4种桌面拾取放置任务中实现79.2%真实世界成功率，显著优于π₀.₅（39.2%）；成功完成门开启、抽屉/橱柜操作及移动拾取放置等复杂任务，验证了零样本迁移的有效性与泛化性。

Conclusion: 充分规模与多样性的程序化合成仿真数据足以支撑鲁棒的机器人操作策略训练，实现面向未见物体与环境的零样本真实世界迁移，无需真实数据采集或任务特定微调，为高效、可扩展的机器人学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: A prevailing view in robot learning is that simulation alone is not enough; effective sim-to-real transfer is widely believed to require at least some real-world data collection or task-specific fine-tuning to bridge the gap between simulated and physical environments. We challenge that assumption. With sufficiently large-scale and diverse simulated synthetic training data, we show that zero-shot transfer to the real world is not only possible, but effective for both static and mobile manipulation. We introduce MolmoBot-Engine, a fully open-source pipeline for procedural data generation across robots, tasks, and diverse simulated environments in MolmoSpaces. With it, we release MolmoBot-Data, a dataset of 1.8 million expert trajectories for articulated object manipulation and pick-and-place tasks. We train three policy classes: MolmoBot, a Molmo2-based multi-frame vision-language model with a flow-matching action head; MolmoBot-Pi0, which replicates the $π_0$ architecture to enable direct comparison; and MolmoBot-SPOC, a lightweight policy suitable for edge deployment and amenable to RL fine-tuning. We evaluate on two robotic platforms: the Franka FR3 for tabletop manipulation tasks and the Rainbow Robotics RB-Y1 mobile manipulator for door opening, drawer manipulation, cabinet interaction, and mobile pick-and-place. Without any real-world fine-tuning, our policies achieve zero-shot transfer to unseen objects and environments. On tabletop pick-and-place, MolmoBot achieves a success rate of 79.2% in real world evaluations across 4 settings, outperforming $π_{0.5}$ at 39.2%. Our results demonstrate that procedural environment generation combined with diverse articulated assets can produce robust manipulation policies that generalize broadly to the real world. Technical Blog: https://allenai.org/blog/molmobot-robot-manipulation

</details>
